titleStmt.title: SII 16.290: original edition by H. K. Narasimhaswami and G. S. Gai
No. 290. (A.R. No. 446 of 1915.) KOṆḌAVĪḌU, NARASAROWPET TALUK, GUNTUR DISTRICT.

summary.p: On a monolithic lamp-column set up in front of the Gōpīnāthasvāmin temple.
This is dated Śaka 1499, Īśvara, Kārtika śu. 11, corresponding to 1577 A.D., October 22, (Tuesday).
It registers the grant of the village Gorijavōlu otherwise called Śrīraṅgarāyapuram in Koṇḍavīṭi-rājya as a sarvamānya-agrahāra by the king to Jātikarta Virūpāksha, son of Mārkoṇḍa.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śubhamastu . svastiśrījayābhyudaya śāli
vāhana śakava¨rṣaṁbulu 1499 A
gunēṭi yīśvara saṁvvatsara kā¨rttika śu 11
lu śrīmadrājādhirāja rājaparamēśvara
śrīvīrapratāpa śrīvīraśrīraṁggarāyalu
dēvamahārāyalu Ayyavāru ratnaśiṁ
hvāsanārūḍhulaipṛthivisāṁmrā
jyamunnu śēyucunnū . mā¨rkoṁḍḍa
putruṁḍaina jāti[ka¨rta] virūpākṣu
niki Iccina dha¨rmaśāsanamu koṁḍa
vīṭirājyamulōni gorijavōli
grāma pratināmadhēyamaina śrī
raṁggarāyapuramunakū sarva
mānyapu Agrahāramugānū
pāliṁcci Iyyanavadhariṁ stimi
ganaka Ā grāmānaku Aṣṭadikku
lakunnu śilāciṁhnālū tū
¨rpuna saṁkrāṁttipāḍu Ājñēyā
naku solasa dakṣiṇaṁ nairuti bhā
gānanu jaṁgālapalle paḍamaṭa
nu caṁdavaramu vāyuvyānaku
polukuṁbāḍu vuttarānaku mō
dugapūṁḍi yīśānyānaku nudu
rubāḍu yī Aṣṭadikkulakunu

lōnaina kṣētramunnu vā
pikūpataṭākavananidhi
nikṣēpakhalu pāṣāṇasiReadjala
ddhasādhyaṁbulaniyeḍi Aṣṭa
bhōgasvāmyālunu sarva
mānyamugānu Iyyanava
dhariṁstimi ganaka mī putra
pautrapāraṁparyaṁgānu
Ācaṁdrā¨rkasthāyigānu A
nubhaviṁci bratukaṁga
lavāru Ani Iccina dha¨rma
śāsanamu . svadattā dvi
guṇaṁ puṇyaṁ paradattā
nu pālanaṁ . paradattāpa
hārēṇa svadattaṁ niṣpalaṁ
bhavēt . svadattāṁ parada
ttāṁ vā yō harēti vasu
ṁdharāṁ . ṣaṣṭhi¨rva¨rṣasaha
srāṇi viṣṭhāyāṁ jāya
tē krimiḥ . śrīśrīśrī
jēyunū .
Digital edition of SII 16.290 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
